name: portscan_detection_full
description: This case template provides steps to analyze and respond to potential port scan activities with all available data from the alert.
author: DFIR-IRIS
summary:
# Context
This case relates to a potential port scan detected in the network.
\# Actions
Ensure the detection is validated and, if malicious, determine the impact and mitigate the threat.

tasks.title: Validate Port Scan Detection
tasks.description: Verify the alert for accuracy. Identify if this is a legitimate port scan or a false positive.

notes.title: Source and Destination
notes.content:
# Network Details

- Record the source IP and port.
- Record the destination IP and port.
- Note the protocol (e.g., TCP, UDP) and direction of the traffic.

# Additional Notes

- Mention any anomalies or patterns observed in the network traffic.

notes.title: Actions Taken
notes.content:
# Remediation Steps

- Document any IPs blocked and firewall rules updated.
- List any tools or scripts used during the remediation process.

notes.title: Incident Summary
notes.content:
# Summary of the Incident

- Provide a summary of the root cause.
- List follow-up actions or recommendations for preventing similar incidents.
